site.title: Austin Computer — Mac Repair, Software & AI Setup in Austin, TX
site.description: Mac repair, software configuration, and AI tutoring & agent setup in Austin, Texas. By appointment — in person or online.
site.tagline: Austin, TX · By appointment · In person or online

hero.headline:
Your Mac fixed.
Your software configured.
Your AI working.
hero.subtext: Mac repair, software setup, and AI tutoring & agent configuration — for people and small businesses around Austin. One technician, no call center, no guesswork.

services.heading: Every visit starts broken and ends working.
services.subtext: Three kinds of problems, one appointment. Here's the before and after of each.
services.pricingNote: Per-hour and per-job pricing available upon request.

states.beforeDesc: Won't start, runs slow, full of malware, cracked screen, dead battery, or just acting strange.
states.afterDesc: Diagnosed and repaired — hardware, OS issues, malware removal, or full tune-up.

states.beforeDesc: New machine, new app, or a setup that's never quite worked the way it should.
states.afterDesc: Set up properly once, with everything talking to everything else the way it's supposed to.

states.beforeTitle: AI feels like a black box
states.beforeDesc: You've heard ChatGPT or AI agents could help your work, but don't know where to start — or you want a custom agent built.
states.afterDesc: Tutored on the tools that matter, or set up with a working agent and API integration built for your actual workflow.

states.beforeDesc: High order volume, outdated product pages, or a storefront that wasn't built to scale with demand.
states.afterDesc: E-commerce site design and updates built for high-turnover catalogs — fast listings, clean checkout, no bottlenecks.

howItWorks.heading: How a visit works
howItWorks.subtext: No drop-off counters, no waiting in line. Just tell us the problem — we'll come to you or hop on a call.

steps.title: Tell us what's going on
steps.desc: A couple questions about your device and the problem — takes under a minute.

steps.title: We call to confirm
steps.desc: You'll hear back to set up an appointment — in person or online — at a time that works for you.

steps.title: We fix it, in person or online
steps.desc: Repaired, configured, or set up — whichever works better for you, with no guesswork either way.

about.heading: One technician. No middleman.
paragraphs: Austin Computer is independent — every repair, setup, and AI project is handled directly, not routed through a queue. That means a real diagnosis instead of a script, and a fix that's actually built for your setup.
From a cracked MacBook screen to a working AI agent connected to your business tools — it's the same person who shows up or hops on the call, and the same person you can reach back out to.

facts.value: By appointment — in person or online

ctaBand.heading: Something not working right?
ctaBand.subtext: Answer a couple quick questions and we'll follow up to schedule your appointment.
